narrative:
Swancreek Twp township has 5,835 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.9%, a clear Republican lean of 9.2 percentage points.
